name: Quran.com
usage: Ayah-level Quran reading, translations, recitations, tafsir resources, and learning tools.

name: Al Quran Cloud
usage: Quran Arabic text, translations, transliteration, audio, surah and juz navigation, and full-Quran search.

name: Quran Foundation APIs
usage: Authenticated Quran content, tafsir, translations, search, bookmarks, notes, and reading progress.

name: Quranic Arabic Corpus
usage: Word-by-word morphology, syntax, grammar, and Quranic Arabic analysis from the University of Leeds project.

name: Tanzil Quran Text
usage: Verified digital Quran text, translations, and Quran text documentation.

name: Sunnah.com
usage: Searchable hadith collections with collection, book, chapter, and hadith numbering.

name: Dorar Hadith Encyclopedia
usage: Arabic hadith search, sourcing, grading notes, and explanations.

name: AlAdhan
usage: Prayer times, calculation methods, madhab school parameter, Hijri calendar data, and qibla direction.

name: Dar al-Ifta al-Misriyyah
usage: Institutional fatwa archive and general Islamic guidance. Personal cases still require direct consultation.

name: SeekersGuidance
usage: Structured introductory courses and answered questions across recognized Sunni legal schools.

name: Yaqeen Institute
usage: Accessible research papers and learning series on faith, seerah, spirituality, and contemporary questions.

name: Muslim Heritage
usage: Articles and research on Muslim history, civilization, science, culture, and institutions.

name: OpenAI Responses API
usage: Optional AI companion with hosted web search and clickable URL citations when an API key is configured.

name: OpenStreetMap, Nominatim, and Overpass
usage: Masjid and halal restaurant finder using open map data with attribution.
